goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 14:15' and should depart from 'london kings cross'.
The train should leave on 'friday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
